title: DFU - Low Battery - Checking DFU pop up if at least one earbud is at low battery
scenario: DFU blocked with low battery pop-up when one or both earbuds are below 5% battery on Device Settings > Software Update screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Scroll to and tap 'Software Update' to open the Software Update screen.
Ensure at least one earbud has battery level less than 5% (e.g., right earbud low, left earbud low, or both low).
Attempt to initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) by tapping the update button or check for updates option.
Observe the pop-up message displayed on the screen.
expected: A pop-up message appears: "Update currently not available, please try back later". After tapping OK, the user is returned to the Device Settings > Software Update screen.
